prs.title: Jp/collector reorg
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: A massive reorganization touching 85 files and 5639 custom lines across the entire AI collector/agent infrastructure, representing a sweeping architectural restructuring of core readiness data-field collectors and chat-agent sub-graphs.

prs.title: Align .env.example to App Runner secrets order
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial alignment of .env.example ordering to match App Runner secrets and a small gitignore/JSON config update across 3 files.

prs.title: Impersonation UX, admin company actions cleanup, products refresh collector chain
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Spans multiple meaningful concerns — impersonation UX (banner, layout, header, user menu), admin company action cleanup, and a products-refresh collector chain — across 16 files with 370 custom lines of coordinated work.

prs.title: SM-474: field updates
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Solid cross-cutting field update touching collectors, schema migrations, registry, score calculator, BTS generation, and UI slides across 13 files with meaningful data/schema and feature changes.

prs.title: SM-471: aws partner badge collector
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Single-file, 2-line addition of an AWS partner badge collector — essentially a trivial stub or config entry.

prs.title: SM-468: readiness / agent refactor
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: A meaningful refactor of the chat-agent and sub-agents (context, state, prompts, tools, route, hook) spread across 19 files, coordinating consistent changes with modest net additions but significant structural impact.

prs.title: Jp/skematic intelligence
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: An epic 238-file, 19349-line PR introducing Skematic Intelligence — encompassing new competitive/rival data collection architecture, extensive TODO planning docs, schema diagrams, and broad platform-wide additions representing weeks of transformative work.

stories.name: AI Collector Architecture Overhaul
stories.rationale: Reorganized the collector system and refactored the readiness agent to establish a more scalable and maintainable AI pipeline architecture.

stories.name: Skematic Intelligence Platform Launch
stories.rationale: Delivered a major new Skematic Intelligence capability, representing a foundational advancement in the platform's AI-powered business readiness offering.

stories.name: Admin Experience & Collector Chain Improvements
stories.rationale: Enhanced admin usability through impersonation UX improvements, cleaned up company actions, and refreshed the products collector chain.

stories.name: AWS Partner Badge Integration
stories.rationale: Added an AWS Partner Badge data collector and updated supporting field definitions to enable tracking of AWS partner certification readiness.

stories.name: Deployment Configuration Alignment
stories.rationale: Aligned the environment example file to match App Runner secrets ordering, reducing deployment configuration friction.
